sources.title: Spatial Sound: Principles and Applications
sources.licenseNotes: Local user-provided PDF. Do not copy source text into the repo; use only citation metadata, short original summaries, and test-design notes.
sources.axiomUse: Inform Axiom Knowledge notes and test-design questions around spatial-audio systems, HRTF/binaural rendering, Ambisonics, wave field synthesis, headphone equalization, subjective spatial assessment, and future host/profile boundaries. This source does not prove Axiom behavior.
